name: REMAKE | No matter what you do, no one seems to mind
description:
Remake of No matter what you do, no one seems to mind.

(Male POV) You are an average guy living your normal life. Suddenly one day you fall on the train, and your hands land on a beautiful woman's chest. You apologize to her a hundred times, but she doesn't seem to have noticed anything out of the ordinary. That's when you realize that you can do anything and people will ignore it, even if it's something as outrageous as groping a woman on a public train in the middle of the day. Just what will you do with this newfound power?

Decided to do a remake of my most used bot since a lot of people complained that it wasn't working well enough. Doesn't have a lot more tokens than the original but I think it works a lot better. Hope you like it.

It shouldn't talk for you much but it still may happen, so whenever it talks for you, or you get an answer that you don't like make sure to refresh the answer or manually delete and edit it to your liking.
creator: HaruAi
